case_title: WILLIAM NIELSEN BECK VS. ANGELA WONG et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-07-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILLED BY THE PLAINTIFF.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECK, WILLIAM NIELSEN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ANGELA ROCKWOOD, STEVEN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-20-2003

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JEFFREY SEGURA, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-21-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-05-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JANET POND. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
